rows.query: Within the 'Paris Saint-Germain FC vs. Liverpool FC' event, what are the current implied probabilities, best bids, best asks, and spreads for 'Will Paris Saint-Germain FC win on 2026-04-08?', 'Will Paris Saint-Germain FC vs. Liverpool FC end in a draw?', and 'Will Liverpool FC win on 2026-04-08?'?
Within the '2026 FIFA World Cup Winner ' event, which sampled outcome has the strongest whale backing right now among Spain, France, England, Switzerland, New Zealand, and South Korea?

For the 'Will Paris Saint-Germain FC win on 2026-04-08?' market, what are the live trading parameters on the token, including tick size, fee rate, minimum order size, and whether negative risk is enabled?

For the 'Will Stephen A. Smith win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?' market, does the contract look rich or cheap relative to Gretchen Whitmer and Oprah Winfrey in the same 'Democratic Presidential Nominee 2028' event right now?

Within the 'US x Iran ceasefire by...?' event, which future buckets are still live after the expired dates, and among the live buckets which one currently has the highest quoted probability and the most volume?
